agent.name: Web Scraper with x402 Micropayments
agent.description: AI-powered web scraping service behind a cryptocurrency paywall. Scrapes and cleans any webpage — removes scripts, styles, ads, navigation, and other junk. Returns clean plain text with statistics including garbage removal percentage and estimated token savings.

pricing.payment_header_description: Include the Base chain USDC transfer transaction hash as the value of this HTTP header.

tools.name: get_service_info
tools.description: Get service pricing, payment instructions, and supported features. FREE — no payment required.

tools.name: scrape_webpage
tools.description: Scrape and clean a webpage. Removes scripts, styles, navigation, ads, and other junk. Returns clean text with statistics (garbage removal %, token savings, site type). Requires x402 payment via X-402-Payment header.

url.description: The full URL of the webpage to scrape (e.g. https://example.com)

output_schema.garbage_removed_percent: number — percentage of junk characters removed
output_schema.estimated_token_saved: integer — estimated LLM tokens saved by cleaning

verification.description: Server verifies USDC Transfer events on Base mainnet. The transaction receipt is fetched via eth_getTransactionReceipt and logs are scanned for a Transfer to the recipient address with amount >= required.
verification.rpc_fallback: Public Base RPC endpoints are tried in order. Set BASE_RPC_URL environment variable for a dedicated endpoint.
